summary: Frontend testing of commercial text integration in Landing.tsx and BecomeWasher.tsx. All 9 requested features verified successfully. The new 'Parcours Client' section with 5 steps is visible on Landing page, 'Pourquoi nos clients adorent Kilolab' section with -15% badge is present, BecomeWasher page shows updated cards with 800€/mois and enriched 4 steps. No occurrences of 'voisin' word found in codebase.

/subscription route redirects to /select-dashboard when not authenticated (expected behavior)
No occurrences of 'voisin' or 'voisins' in any .tsx/.ts files (verified via grep)
